cards.back: A principle that states a class should have only one reason to change.
A principle that advises against duplicating code or data to avoid errors and maintainability.
A principle that recommends simplicity in design and implementation to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.
A principle that cautions against adding features or functionality that may not be needed in the current iteration or project.
A principle that aims to reduce dependencies between modules or components to improve maintainability and scalability.
